title: Badge
description: A badge communicates status, category, or count in a compact visual form.
whenToUse: To label status or state (active/pending/error). To communicate a category tag. To show counts or notifications.
whenNotToUse: For interactive filter tags, use a Chip component instead.
_legacyAccessibilityNotes: Badges are decorative by default; convey meaning via surrounding text as well. Do not rely on color alone — the label text carries the meaning.
